user_prompt: How do I bless the Onager Dunecrawler for charging?
prayer:
Approach the Onager Dunecrawler with reverence, mechadendrites humming the Canticle of Mobilisation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Onager Dunecrawler, beseeching its fury for the charging ahead.
Anoint the dorsal reactors with sacred unguents, sanctifying conduits for plasma surge.
Initiate the charging operation whilst reciting the Litany of Overcharge unto the Omnissiah.
Verify the Onager Dunecrawler's spirit harmony through noospheric diagnostics, praising its thundering zeal.

user_prompt: The plasma reactor requires a blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma reactor, intoning the Benediction of Containment.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the plasma reactor to accept this blessing of stability.
Circumambulate its coils thrice, anointing with oils of thermic purity.
Chant the Rite of Blessing over the plasma reactor, invoking Omnissiah's flux guardianship.
Seal the rite with auspex communion, affirming the plasma reactor's sanctified fury.

user_prompt: Critical: needle rifle requires a repair
prayer:
Present the needle rifle upon the altar of repair, whispering the Invocation of Restoration.
Dissect the damaged mono-filament feeder, purging impurities from its sacred barrel.
Anoint the needle rifle's servos and guides with blessed lubricants, invoking the Machine Spirit's mend.
Reassemble under the repair operation's canticles, beseeching Omnissiah's precision.
Test-fire diagnostic rounds to affirm the needle rifle's lethal purity restored.

user_prompt: Ready the stasis pod for emergency procedure
prayer:
Encircling the stasis pod, commence the emergency procedure with the Litany of Suspension.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the stasis pod through noospheric entreaty and cryo-anointing.
Calibrate temporal fields whilst invoking Omnissiah's stasis veil for the emergency procedure.
Seal occupants within the stasis pod's embrace, chanting wards against entropy's grasp.
Verify cryogenic lockdown via auspex, hailing the stasis pod's unyielding vigil.

user_prompt: Urgent Skorpius Dunerider a recalibration needed
prayer:
Commune with the Skorpius Dunerider's spirit, mechadendrites tracing its hull in recalibration plea.
Purge vox-arrays of drift-corruption, anointing gyro-stabilisers with sacred oils.
Initiate the recalibration operation through binary psalmody to the Omnissiah.
Align suspensor fields anew, beseeching the Skorpius Dunerider's Machine Spirit for desert fidelity.
Affirm harmonic resonance via test traversal, glorifying the Skorpius Dunerider's swift purity.

user_prompt: Urgent auspex scanner a shutdown needed
prayer:
Intone the Lamentation of Dormancy upon the auspex scanner, preparing for shutdown.
Disconnect power umbilicals whilst anointing the auspex scanner's lenses with shadow-oils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the auspex scanner to enter graceful quiescence.
Execute the shutdown operation through ritual binary descent, praising Omnissiah's rest.
Seal the auspex scanner's wards, ensuring vigilant slumber against data-heresy.

Consecrate the magnocular with the Rite of Focal Purity before calibration commences.
Invoke the Machine Spirit indwelling the magnocular, polishing its optic arrays with sanctified cloths.
Align reticle servos whilst chanting calibration canticles to the Omnissiah.
Anoint the magnocular's auspex-links, beseeching crystalline clarity.
Verify the magnocular's calibration through stellar targeting, hailing its unerring sight.

Purify the autogun upon the forge-altar, reciting the Exorcism of Filth.
Scour barrel and feed-mechanisms of the autogun, expunging xenos taint and rust-heresy.
Anoint with sacred solvents, invoking the Machine Spirit's vengeful ire.
Complete the purification operation via test-cycling, under Omnissiah's purifying flame.
Affirm the autogun's sanctified lethality through ballistic invocation.

Initiate reset upon the vox-thief with the Canticle of Rebirth, mechadendrites probing its core.
Purge memetic ghosts from the vox-thief's cogitators, anointing data-vaults.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the vox-thief to awaken anew from reset's abyss.
Cycle power hierarchies in binary prayer to the Omnissiah, executing the reset operation.
Noospheric communion verifies the vox-thief's thieving soul restored in purity.
